from __future__ import annotations

def nested_list_search_map_candidate_positive():
    users = [{"id": 10, "name": "Ana"}, {"id": 11, "name": "Bo"}]
    target_ids = [11, 10]
    names = []
    for target in target_ids:
        for user in users:
            if user["id"] == target:
                names.append(user["name"])
                break
    return names
